summary: Comprehensive testing of Phase 5+ enhancements completed successfully. All major features working correctly including guest JWT tokens, QR generation, request comments, KB articles, drag-and-drop Kanban boards, and guest panels.

minor_issues.impact: Cosmetic - KB articles creation works correctly

data_structure_issues.impact: Guest panel may miss some service categories
Guest panel may miss menu data

navigation_issues.issue: Session resets frequently during navigation testing

passed_tests: Backend: All Phase 5+ APIs working (guest tokens, QR generation, comments, KB articles)
Backend: All existing Phase 1-5 APIs working correctly
Frontend: Login and dashboard loading successfully
Frontend: Requests board with drag-and-drop Kanban and 'Drop here' placeholders
Frontend: Rooms page with Copy QR, Download QR, and Print All QR buttons
Frontend: Guest room panel (/g/grand-hotel/room/R101) fully functional
Frontend: Guest table panel (/g/grand-hotel/table/T1) fully functional
QR Generation: PNG and PDF generation working
Request Comments: Add and retrieve comments working
KB Articles: Create and list articles working
